category_sources: source_facts.description identifies tfocus as a tool for selecting and executing Terraform plan/apply on specific resources.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and source_facts.homepage identify the project as tfocus.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project page and README documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/nwiizo/tfocus, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions Terraform plan/apply for selected resources; current_curation.tags includes cli.
